mapper.sql: id, title, content, target, published, published_at, expires_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_announcement WHERE published = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > NOW()) ORDER BY published_at DESC
SELECT FROM blog_announcement WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM blog_announcement WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM blog_announcement WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_announcement (title, content, target, published, published_at, expires_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{target}, #{published}, #{publishedAt}, #{expiresAt}, NOW(), NOW(), NULL, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE blog_announcement
title = #{title}, content = #{content}, target = #{target}, published = #{published}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE blog_announcement SET deleted_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
